messages.author: mackenzie
messages.text: I am looking to understand two things about MeshCore for my app development: what should be used as a unique ID for a node: I am currently using the 6 byte prefix of the public key How to get a unique message id for messages sent and received via the Radio Can someone let me know, or point me at the part of the docs that I should look at? Thanks in advance!
messages.content_html:
I am looking to understand two things about MeshCore for my app development:
  • what should be used as a unique ID for a node: I am currently using the 6 byte prefix of the public key
  • How to get a unique message id for messages sent and received via the Radio Can someone let me know, or point me at the part of the docs that I should look at? Thanks in advance!

messages.author: mackenzie
messages.text: is there any concept of a reply to a message? If so, how would a reply indicate to what message it is a reply to?
messages.content_html: is there any concept of a reply to a message? If so, how would a reply indicate to what message it is a reply to?

messages.author: mackenzie
messages.text: Looking at the packet structure, it only sends 6 bytes of the public key, so using that as my "node id"
messages.content_html: Looking at the packet structure, it only sends 6 bytes of the public key, so using that as my "node id"
